zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bulkeley於1290年出生在英國爾布爾可勒時，他的父親Lord William Bulkeley50歲，母親Maud Davenport45歲。他於1317年與Maude Davenport在英國英格蘭爾南特維其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1326年在英國英格蘭爾享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bulkeley于1290年出生在英国爾布爾可勒时，他的父亲Lord William Bulkeley50岁，母亲Maud Davenport45岁。他于1317年与Maude Davenport在英国英格兰爾南特維其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1326年在英国英格兰爾享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bulkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bulkeley was born in 1290, in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England, his father, Lord William Bulkeley, was 50 and his mother, Maud Davenport, was 45. He married Maude Davenport in 1317, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1326, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bulkeley est né en 1290, à Bulkeley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord William Bulkeley, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Maud Davenport, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Maude Davenport en 1317, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1326, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bulkeley 1290 in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord William Bulkeley 50 und seine Mutter Maud Davenport 45. Er hat 1317 in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Maude Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1326 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bulkeley è nato il nel 1290 nel Bulkeley, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Lord William Bulkeley, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Maud Davenport, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Maude Davenport nel 1317, nel Nantwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1326, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bulkeleyが1290年にイギリスチェシュアイアブルケリーで生まれた時，父Lord William Bulkeleyは50歳，母Maud Davenportは45歳であった。1317年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチでMaude Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1326年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bulkeley(이)가 1290년 영국 체실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord William Bulkeley(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Davenport(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1317년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 난트위치에서 Maude Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bulkeley nasceu em 1290, em Bulkeley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord William Bulkeley, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Maud Davenport, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Maude Davenport em 1317, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1326, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bulkeley родился в 1290 г. в местности булкели, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord William Bulkeley было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Davenport, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude Davenport в 1317 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1326 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Bulkeley nació en 1290, en Bulkeley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord William Bulkeley, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Maud Davenport, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Maude Davenport en 1317, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1326, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años.
